name: United Airlines Holdings, Inc.
summary: United Airlines Holdings, Inc. (UAL) is the holding company for United Airlines, Inc., a major U.S. commercial air carrier. The company provides passenger and cargo air transportation services across domestic and international routes. United Airlines operates scheduled airline services connecting hundreds of destinations globally, offering economy, business, and first-class travel options along with freight and mail services.

products.name: Passenger Air Transportation
products.description: Scheduled domestic and international passenger airline services across multiple cabin classes.

products.name: Cargo Air Transportation
products.description: Freight and mail transport services carried on passenger and dedicated cargo flights.
